name: FinancialRelationshipAndLifecycle
description: Explicit active or retired transfer/refund classification with typed roles, owner correction, and reconciliation-authorized replacement.
schema_def: - reconciliationDecisionId: nullable; set only for a statement-authoritative relationship replacement

Constraints: distinct active transactions; transfer has exactly one outflow and one inflow across distinct owned accounts with equal principal; refund names an original negative outflow and positive refund credit on the same owned account in ZAR whose absolute minor-unit amounts are exactly equal; every transaction participant has at most one active financial relationship; revoke/replace retires atomically. Partial, cumulative, and over-refund relationships are unsupported. Statement correction may replace a relationship only when substituting the replacement transaction preserves every invariant; otherwise correction returns review-required and commits no financial effect.
